goal: Fix Celtic Cross full-reading result page overflowing right edge on mobile (IMG_4894 — challenge card clipped)
done: Reset top/left/right/bottom to auto on .celtic-slot--challenge inside the <=640px media query
root_cause: Base .celtic-slot--challenge pins position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)rotate(90deg) to cross over the center card. The <=640px column-stack override reset only position and transform, leaving top/left:50% in place; with a higher-specificity rule computing position:relative, the leftover left:50% (~231px) shoved the challenge slot off the right edge, forcing 72px horizontal overflow.
fix: Added top/left/right/bottom:auto to the existing mobile .celtic-slot--challenge rule so the inset is neutralized along with position/transform.
verified: Reproduced live CSS in chrome harness at 390/500px: challenge slot was left:371/right:591 (overflow +72px); after reset it returns to left:140/right:360, layout overflow goes negative (no overflow). md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
